items.title: Pascal Siakam with a huge grin as Yuki Kawamura drives and draws a foul. Then, Pacers/Yuki force an 8-second violation and Siakam pops up to celebrate. Toppin and Huff get on their feet afterwards.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Pascal Siakam with a huge grin as Yuki Kawamura drives and draws a foul. Then, Pacers/Yuki force an 8-second violation and Siakam pops up to celebrate. Toppin and Huff get on their feet afterwards.
